declared_mechanism: Added mandatory explicit entity-constraint listing before reasoning.

Added mandatory entity-binding step before evaluating options.
Added mandatory constraint-listing step before comparing options.

Added constraint propagation as the elimination method after constraint enumeration.
Inserted mandatory entity-reference binding as a discrete step preceding constraint propagation.
Changed constraint propagation method to pairwise compatibility checks.
Added mandatory entity-reference listing and unique antecedent verification before constraint propagation.

Added explicit negation constraint listing and verification after propagation
Changed verification from listing to systematic cross-reference table check
Added verification step with tie-breaking rule after mapping table creation.
Changed verification to a scoring-based resolution mechanism.
add antecedent contradiction test before propagation
swap scenario test for pairwise consistency check
Added constraint contradiction checking after mapping.
Added temporal ordering construction and consistency verification.
